## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? Why? Keep it short. -->

## Related issue

<!-- Closes #N, or "—" if not tracked. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Pick one or more; aligns with the Conventional Commits scope used in commits. -->

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `refactor` — no behavior change
- [ ] `test` — tests only
- [ ] `chore` / `build` / `ci`
- [ ] Breaking change (commit uses `!` or `BREAKING CHANGE:`)

## Scope

<!-- Affected package(s): tokens, mkdocs, docusaurus, hugo, landing, docs, ci, release, none -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/en/v1.0.0/)
- [ ] Updated relevant documentation
- [ ] Added / updated tests where applicable
- [ ] CI is green locally (or will be on push)
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or credentials committed
